title: sassafras variifolium var. albidum
intro: Sassafras variifolium var. albidum, also known as White Sassafras, is a plant species belonging to the Sassafras genus and is native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of White Sassafras include reducing fever, relieving pain and discomfort, and supporting the immune system. White Sassafras can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
